description: Eskapo is the BEST punk band in Vallejo, CA!!!! With thier unique mix of punk, hardcore, street punk, and oi, they ROCK HARD!!!!! They stand for UNITY and DIVERSITY, with members of many backgrounds and ethnicities. Three out of the five members are from the Phillipines, and they even have a few songs in Tagalog (main language of the Phillipines). These guys have been around for awhile and they are my favorite local band! And seeing them live is an experience in itself. If you don't like getting slammed around, bumped into, rammed into chairs, and walls, or getting knocked down, I suggest you stay clear of the pit at one of ESKAPO's shows!!! -Mike Have-Not (of the V-Town Have-Nots)
subject: Eskapo the band
title: IUMA: Eskapo the band
